commands: vp pm config --help # should show help
vp pm config list --location project > /dev/null # should list all project configuration
vp pm config set vitePlusPmConfigTestKey test-value --location project # should set config value in project scope
vp pm config get vitePlusPmConfigTestKey --location project # should get config value from project scope
vp pm config delete vitePlusPmConfigTestKey --location project # should delete config key from project scope
